title: hieracium laurinum subsp. subhispidum
intro: Hieracium laurinum subsp. subhispidum, a subspecies of the Hieracium laurinum plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It is primarily used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium laurinum subsp. subhispidum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to address various health concerns.
